::: matrix-bg
---
title: "Welcome, Neo. This is Huseyin Emre Bacak's Analytics Lab for EMU660."
---

Hi, My name is Hüseyin Emre Bacak.

This is my Matrix-themed personal webpage designed for EMU660.

Please stay tuned to follow my works on data analytics, EMU660, blog posts, and more.

P.S: I created this Matrix-themed personal webpage thanks to generative AI — special thanks to Google Gemini :-)

You can see prompts I used for applying this theme to a personal webpage using Quatro Markdown and GitHub Pages tools [here](https://gemini.google.com/share/65e47a96adc9) and [here.](https://gemini.google.com/share/5d2905d016ac)
:::
